summary: Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed (health, leads CRUD with validation, chat with Claude integration & session continuity). Frontend: Home loads with 12 symptom cards, search/filter/dialog work, lead form valid submit navigates to /gracias, /privacidad and /terminos render correctly. Chatbot backend integration works (Claude returns Spanish reply mentioning veterinarian and structured advice) but the floating launcher button in bottom-right is BLOCKED by the 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay which intercepts pointer events, so a normal user click cannot open the chatbot panel. JS-dispatched click works fine confirming the underlying widget is functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Floating chat launcher at bottom-5 right-5 (z-50) is covered by the 'Made with Emergent' badge (#emergent-badge) which intercepts pointer events. Playwright cannot click without force=True and real users may also struggle. Consider increasing z-index of the launcher above the badge (e.g. z-[60] or higher) and/or repositioning to bottom-left, or adding margin to clear the badge area.

Invalid email submission relies solely on HTML5 type=email native validation. No sonner toast error is shown as required by spec ('Lead form submit with invalid email shows toast error'). Add explicit JS validation that triggers toast.error(...) on invalid email before submit.
Disclaimer banner is visually present on the home page but missing data-testid="disclaimer-banner" attribute referenced in spec.

issues: Emergent badge overlaps chatbot launcher button - z-index/positioning conflict

action_items: Increase z-index of ChatbotWidget launcher (currently z-50) above the Emergent badge OR reposition the launcher to avoid overlap (e.g. bottom-5 left-5, or add right-24 to clear the badge).
Add explicit client-side email validation in LeadForm.jsx that calls toast.error('Email inválido') when email regex fails, instead of relying only on HTML5 native validation.
Add data-testid="disclaimer-banner" to the legal disclaimer block on Home page for testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is referenced inside chat() at line 139 but defined at line 173, AFTER api_router includes chat. Works only because endpoint is called at runtime — should still move logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) to top of file (just after imports) for clarity and to avoid future bugs if module-level code changes.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI; recommend lifespan handler.
Chat endpoint: when streaming raises an exception, the user message is already persisted but no assistant message — fine, but consider catching and rolling back or storing an error marker.
EmailStr from pydantic correctly rejects invalid emails — backend validation OK.
All 12 symptoms tagged pets:['perro','gato'] which means perro/gato filters always show 12 cards — acceptable but data could be enriched to differentiate.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed lead entries via test_create_lead_valid (test_juan@example.com). Created chat_messages docs via TestChat. Safe to remove if cleanup desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully working (Claude via emergentintegrations replies in Spanish, mentions veterinarian, session continuity confirmed). Main UI bug is z-index overlap of chatbot launcher with Made-with-Emergent badge. After main agent fixes z-index/positioning, retest by clicking the launcher WITHOUT force=True. Also retest invalid-email lead submit for sonner toast appearance after main agent adds client-side validation.
rca of the issue:
Chatbot launcher uses Tailwind class z-50 (z-index:50) with position fixed bottom-5 right-5. The Emergent platform injects a global #emergent-badge element fixed in the same bottom-right area with a higher effective stacking context, intercepting pointer events on the launcher. Confirmed by Playwright error: '

Made with Emergent

from subtree intercepts pointer events'. Mitigation: raise launcher to z-[9999] or shift left (e.g. right-28) to clear the badge footprint.
